content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the left ahead with the dashed center line visible slightly to the right of center, and the car appears to be on the left side of the track continuing through the left curve.

Target waypoint: nearest_waypoints[1] + 5 = 40 + 5 = 45
Waypoint 45: (5.9295, 2.7721)
Car position: (6.6206, 2.4106)
Bearing = atan2(2.7721 - 2.4106, 5.9295 - 6.6206) = atan2(0.3615, -0.6911)
= 180 - atan2(0.3615, 0.6911) = 180 - 27.6° = 152.4°
Current heading: 129.89°
Delta = 152.4 - 129.89 = 22.51° → left

```json

  "reasoning": "Track curves left ahead with delta +22.5° to waypoint 45; car is left of center but on track, using 15° left steering at speed 1.5 to follow the curve and bring the car back toward the center line.",

  },

}
```
